calendar.matters:
For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-09-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RAMONA MAYON For Writ Of Mandate.

The motion for writ of mandate is denied without prejudice. To obtain a writ of mandate, petitioner must serve the opposing party (here, the City and County of San Francisco) with the underlying petition, which does not yet appear to have occurred here, and must serve the opposing party with its motion for writ of mandate. Service of a motion must be made at least sixteen court days before the hearing, with additional time if the moving party uses a method of service other than personal service. Petitioner provides no proof of service to show that she has complied with these requirements. To have the power to order relief, a court must have jurisdiction over the parties, and the court has no jurisdiction where one party has not been served in the manner required by law.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RAMONA MAYON Motion For Writ Of Mandate

The motion for writ of mandate is denied without prejudice. To obtain a writ of mandate, petitioner must serve the opposing party with the underlying petition, which does not yet appear to have occurred here, and must serve the opposing party with its motion for writ of mandate. Service of a motion must be made at least sixteen court days before the hearing, with additional time if the moving party uses a method of service other than personal service. Petitioner has not complied with these requirements here. The court cannot grant relief where notice has not been duly given to the party from whom relief is requested.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
